actionUnits.condition: Validate auto-ignition logic of Fire (MonoBehaviour guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d; scene component matches fields: debug=0, isOn=0, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, maxNeighborDistance=4, downMultiplier=2, totalHitTime=5, onNeighborsThreshold=2, minNeighborDownDistance=3, mainEffectGo=fileID 1849464941111748095). BoxCollider present, no Rigidbody. No UnityEvent m_Calls defined. To trigger: require >=2 neighbor fires within maxNeighborDistance so that onNeighbors >= onNeighborsThreshold; this sets shouldTurnOn=true and after timeToOn=Random[40,60] seconds fire turns on and UpdateFireState(true) plays ParticleSystem and notifies neighbors/FireController. Need neighbor setup and/or FireController to call FindNeighbors and provide neighbor states.

Validate extinguish logic via IWaterInteractable.WaterHit while fire is ON. Fire script (guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d; likely component fileID: 2592690533154406537 in prefab) requires repeated WaterHit(normal) calls such that currentHitInterval never exceeds maxHitInterval=2 until cumulative currentHitTime >= totalHitTime=5, at which point isOn=false and UpdateFireState(true) stops ParticleSystem and notifies neighbors/FireController. This GameObject has a Collider so can be interacted with, but WaterHit has a Vector3 parameter; a water-hose or test hook must invoke it periodically (<2s) for ~5s.
